text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Jingle, jingle, jingle, jingle...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I wanna go somewhere special today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, it is the holidays, so there's only one
place that fits the bill...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And that's a rural fishing village!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expected somewhere more fancy, but I was
completely off the mark. Several bus rides later,
we arrive at a snowy fishing village.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our footsteps crunch with each step through the
snow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bwooom...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This is it! This is the atmosphere I was hoping for!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The snow blowing against the window, the faintly
visible fishing port in the distance, and the barely
audible sound of a steam whistle...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've been transported right into the
world of enka music. It's so awesome...
choice_data_list: It feels kind of melancholic, though, doesn't it?
It feels kind of melancholic, though, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Melancholic? Well, I'd probably feel that way if
nobody else was here...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I feel fine because you're here with me!
Besides, if I had free rein over how I celebrated
the holidays, I'd do it in peace and tranquility.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how boisterous Kitasan Black usually
is, I'm surprised by how austere her preferences
are.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, do you want anything to drink,
Trainer? I can pour it for you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What should I have? Hmm... I think I've have a
warm glass of cider...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I prefer to drink it warm rather than cold.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
There's just something so good about warm apple
cider. It just goes down so smooth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a moment of shock, I realize she's talking
about non-alcoholic cider. What's more, she has
quite a sophisticated way of drinking it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel like having cake today. I think I'm in
the mood for some soy-pickled squid or fish
cakes with wasabi!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, Happy Holidays, Trainer! Let's take it
easy today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We toast each other while gazing at the falling
snow. It turns out to be a strangely charming time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We knock back drink after drink while reminiscing
on times since passed.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Spending time like this is so nice... This might
really be enough for us.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, I feel like we normally live in excess, or
like... There's just so many things around us all the
time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But if you whittle everything down to the bare
necessities...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You'll discover all we really need in life is some
food and drink with a close friend, and the
occasional toot of a distant steam whistle...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's what I mean by this being enough. I could
live happily with just what we have here.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I feel so moved... I've always wanted to visit a
place like this at least once in my life.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for accompanying me here,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black looks totally relaxed as she enjoys
the holidays in a simple yet reflective manner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for me, I feel lucky to see a side of the clutch
captain Kitasan Black that no one else has ever
seen before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for me, I feel lucky to see a side of the clutch
captain Kitasan Black that no one else has ever
seen before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Old Fisherman
text_block_list.text: Kita... Are you there, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? You're one of the local fishermen... Is
everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Old Fisherman
text_block_list.text:
We prepared a festive li'l tree for ya. Care to take
a look?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A tree?! For me? What do you think, Trainer?
Should we go?
choice_data_list: Looks like you're getting a warm welcome!
Looks like you're getting a warm welcome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The news that none other than the Kitasan Black is visiting this village is bound to be a big deal.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's go check it out, then! We can't walk
away from such a kind offer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The old man takes Kitasan Black by the arm and
leads us to a mountain path that lies beyond the
village. We follow it until...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoooa, check out this tree!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're greeted by the stunning sight of a
magnificent fir tree reaching towards the sky.

text_block_list.name: Old Fisherman
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any ornaments for it, but I did my
best to sweep some of the snow off and make it
look prettier.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This is more than enough for me! Nature on its
own is plenty beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This is the ultimate gift, don't you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yeah. Want to make a wish?
Yeah. Want to make a wish?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sure! Let's do it together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a big smile on her face, Kitasan Black clasps
her hands together and makes a wish.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We promise to live our lives with dignity, just like
this great tree.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even if we're nothing to look at, we'll stand true
and tall, and penetrate through any thick snow
clouds that get in our way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The great fir tree and snowy sky above appear to
fully accept Kitasan Black's earnest wish.
